projects.title: Babu : Desktop Assistant
projects.subtitle: Voice-Activated CLI Assistant
projects.description: Babu is a CLI-based desktop assistant built with Python that helps users automate tasks, manage schedules, and access information quickly through voice commands.
features: Real-time voice command recognition and parsing
Speech synthesis (text-to-speech) feedback using Pyttsx3
Custom system shell and application automation commands
Fast local info search and scheduling automation
projects.highlights: Designed a custom CLI helper featuring hands-free system control and fast local automation

projects.title: TalentKhoj
projects.subtitle: Talent Acquisition & Career Marketplace
projects.description: TalentKhoj is a robust, production-grade talent acquisition and career marketplace platform. Engineered with a secure Flask architecture, a normalized relational database design, and real-time community tools, it addresses the full lifecycle of employment: from AI-driven resume optimization and verifiable employer-certified badges, to social engagement and real-time collaboration.
features: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with custom permission decorators
Secure cookie sessions and PBKDF2 password hashing
Thread-Local database connection management to prevent race conditions during concurrent AJAX operations
Automatic server-side HTML-to-PDF compilation for resumes
Responsive dashboards custom-tailored for candidates and companies
projects.highlights: Architected a secure, concurrent Flask recruitment platform with thread-safe database pooling

projects.title: AnonyVox
projects.subtitle: Real-Time AI Voice Changer
projects.description: AnonyVox is a real-time, desktop audio application built in Python that wraps Retrieval-based Voice Conversion (RVC) and a low-latency DSP vocal effects matrix into a single, cohesive, premium dark-theme utility.
features: Low-latency duplex audio pipeline at 44.1kHz using sounddevice
RVC AI Voice Conversion with GPU acceleration (CUDA)
Spectral Inversion Engine (Frequency Mirroring) via rfft / irfft matrix
Vocal Effects Matrix featuring Ring Modulation, Tremolo, and Overdrive Distortion
Premium cyberpunk dashboard with a reactive 33 FPS bezier-curve waveform visualizer
projects.highlights: Engineered a low-latency multithreaded AI voice morpher with custom real-time audio DSP pipelines

projects.title: Bahun-D Run Game
projects.subtitle: 3D Unity Endless Runner
projects.description: A game project inspired by Bahun ko Khasi video from Twake Productions. Built for school with creative curved-world graphics and responsive gameplay mechanics in Unity.
features: Curved world mechanics and dynamic visual effects
3-lane movement controller with jump/slide dynamics
Procedural obstacle and track generation system
Layered audio SFX system and persistent high-scores
projects.highlights: Developed a mobile-optimized 3D Unity game with custom vertex curve shaders

projects.title: New Holy
projects.subtitle: School Web Application Portal
projects.description: A modern web application built with JavaScript, showcasing dynamic functionality, school administration mockups, and interactive student experience.
features: Dynamic content sections for announcements and galleries
Interactive online admission intake forms
Responsive, clean UI adapted across mobile and desktop screens
Fast client-side navigation prototype
projects.highlights: Designed a modern school portal mockup showcasing premium responsiveness and dynamic UI features

projects.title: Kaam Paryo Web App
projects.subtitle: Hyperlocal Task Marketplace
projects.description: Kaam Paryo is a hyperlocal task marketplace connecting people who need tasks done with skilled taskers in their area. Built with real-time GPS tracking, smart matching algorithms, and a seamless user experience.
features: Live location tracking and maps via GalliMaps API
Real-time notifications and task updates using Socket.IO
Geospatial query-based task matching within specific radii
JWT-based sessions and secure task status management
projects.highlights: Co-created Nepal's first hyperlocal real-time task platform using WebSockets and Express
